title: Burgundy Tasting Evening — Sai Ying Pun
body: Join John Dewe for an evening exploring the elegant Pinot Noir and Chardonnay of Burgundy. Limited seating at our High Street location.

title: New Arrival: Puchang Wines from Xinjiang
body: Discover Puchang's organic wines that embody the essence of the Gobi Desert terroir — a rare departure from our usual French focus, and a genuine discovery.

title: Rhône Valley Selection — This Week
body: Bold, expressive reds from the Rhône Valley, hand-picked by John. Stop by High Street to taste before you buy.
